summary: Full backend (17 pytest) + frontend (Playwright) regression for RRS Team IMP. 100% of the requested checks PASS. Backend covers public + admin CRUD with httpOnly cookie auth; frontend covers home rendering, contact->messages integration, admin login/logout, stats, gallery upload (XHR 200, tile rendered), review add (toast + row), messages list.

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' inside the rating <select>. Use plain text content for <option> children (no spans/icons). Non-breaking but logged to console on every render.

action_items: Optional polish: in ReviewsAdmin rating <select>, replace any <span> inside <option> with a plain string (e.g. '5 ★') to remove the React hydration warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 440 lines and OK for now, but consider splitting routes (auth/admin/public) into separate modules if it grows further.
CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True when CORS_ORIGINS='*'. This works in dev/preview but in production should be set to explicit origins for security.
init_storage caches a module-level _storage_key; if the storage service rotates keys, requires backend restart. Acceptable for now.

admin_update_message ignores any body and always sets read=True. Endpoint is documented as 'mark read' so OK, but the name PATCH implies arbitrary updates. Consider renaming to /messages/{id}/read or accept a body.
MongoDB _id is correctly projected out in all reads.
All env vars required at import (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, JWT_SECRET, ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD) — good fail-fast behavior.
Seed admin updates password when .env differs — matches playbook expectation.
Cookies use samesite=none + secure=true — correct for cross-origin httpOnly cookies behind https preview proxy.
seed_data_creation: Tests create and clean up most test data (reviews, messages). One uploaded test image (gallery-tile id 0d3d94c6-...) and one TEST review (TEST UI Reviewer / Cluj) remained from UI verification — main agent may delete via admin UI if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints incl. the cookie auth flow, public reviews approved-only filter, gallery upload + binary fetch + soft delete via Emergent object storage. Frontend uses data-testids: login-email/password/submit; nav-overview/gallery/reviews/messages; logout-button; upload-file/title/submit; gallery-tile-{id}/delete-image-{id}; review-author/location/rating/approved/text/submit; review-row-{id}/delete-review-{id}; message-row-{id}/delete-message-{id}; contact-name/email-input/phone-input/message/submit. Auth uses httpOnly cookies (samesite=none, secure=true) — axios must keep withCredentials:true.
